message: Hey %player%, I need your help! My best friend’s graduation party is coming up, and I want to plan a surprise party. Can you help me out?

I was thinking of surprising them for their graduation party, and I want to get info from them, but if I ask them directly, they might get suspicious. Can you find out for me? I think they are inside the school right now. I will follow up with you inside after you finish talking to them.

options.text: Of course, I can do that. I’ll talk to them casually to get the details. See you later.
Sorry, I'm a little busy right now, maybe next time. See you later!

actions.item: Help Madison plan the perfect surprise party by finding out what her friend likes
